snippet.title: Expected Free Energy in one page | §3.1 · #28 #Shorts
snippet.description:
Part 28 of 100 — The Learn Arc. Session §3.1.

The decision rule: pick a policy, roll it forward, predict future states, predict future observations, compute F at each step, average. G = expected free energy, one scalar per policy. Softmax with precision γ picks the action. One page. One equation. One decision procedure.
